title: Zoomer Bows
description: A mod that bring is more bow variants.
body:
# What is Zoomer Bows:

Zoomer bows is a mod that ads a few new bows, inspired from our Zoomcraft V4 progression.
This mod is going to be used to provide more bows in our modpack, having them scale based on the player's combat level

## Should you use this mod:

Usage of this mod, in a new minecraft instance is discouraged at the moment, as it lacks any recipes & extra functionality, which are currently present only on Zoompack V4.


## Permissions:

You can freely use Zoomer bows for all intent & purposes in modpack development, though we do not recommend adding it without having the tools necessary to scale these bows.
